nasb.text: “Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, For He has visited us and accomplished redemption for His people,

esv.text: “Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, for he has visited and redeemed his people

cnv.text: “主，以色列的　神，是應當稱頌的， 因他眷顧自己的子民，施行救贖，

ccb.text: “主——以色列的上帝当受称颂， 因祂眷顾、救赎了自己的子民，

csbs.text: “主——以色列的神是当受颂赞的， 因为他临到了他的子民， 并施行了救赎。
